title: Marco the Magnificent
director: Denys de La Patellière, Raoul Lévy, Noël Howard
writer: Denys de La Patellière, Raoul Lévy, Jacques Rémy
actors: Horst Buchholz, Grégoire Aslan, Robert Hossein
plot: Young Marco Polo travels to China to help Kublai Khan fight against rebels, headed by his own son, with a new invention: gunpowder.
